CREATE TABLE Orders (OrderID INT PRIMARY KEY, ShippedDate DATETIME);
INSERT INTO Orders (OrderID, ShippedDate) VALUES (1, stringdate('1996.06.04 13:30:00')), (2, stringdate('1996.06.05 15:45:30'));
SELECT left(datestring(ShippedDate), 10) FROM Orders WHERE ShippedDate > stringdate('1996.06.03 00:00:00');
SELECT left(datestring(ShippedDate), 10) AS DateString FROM Orders WHERE ShippedDate < stringdate('1997.01.01 00:00:00') ORDER BY ShippedDate;
SELECT O.OrderID, left(datestring(O.ShippedDate), 10) AS ShippedDate FROM Orders O JOIN (SELECT stringdate('1996.06.05 13:30:00') AS FilterDate) F ON O.ShippedDate > F.FilterDate;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Orders WHERE ShippedDate BETWEEN stringdate('1996.06.01 00:00:00') AND stringdate('1996.06.30 23:59:59');
SELECT OrderID, ShippedDate FROM Orders WHERE ShippedDate = stringdate('1996.06.04 13:30:00');
WITH FilteredOrders AS (SELECT OrderID FROM Orders WHERE ShippedDate > stringdate('1996.06.04')) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FilteredOrders;
SELECT left(datestring(OS.ShippedDate), 10) AS ShippedDate FROM Orders OS WHERE OS.ShippedDate < stringdate('1996.06.05 15:45:30') ORDER BY OS.ShippedDate DESC LIMIT 5;
